text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, test, test... Hello, good evening, or perhaps
good morning.

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
Today, Machan guest starred in a photo shoot
Vodka was doing of her bike. Apparently, it was a
very cool bike.

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
Also, Scarlet was taking selfies, so I tried to
photo bomb her, but she noticed—then invited
me to take one together.

text_block_list.name: Aston Machan
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I was able to leave more memories
with everybody today. I really hope so. Well,
that's all for today.
